tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_dungeon_po: Creative-only - Infinite portal that regenerate instead of disapearing.
While in creative, shift and right-click to change destination.
tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_flag: Creative only - permanently unlocks every secret base PC features and give unlimited battery
tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_egg: Creative only - right-click an incubator to grow it instantly
tooltip.cobblesafari.lucky_mining_helmet: Wearing this helmet brings good luck
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_random_bal: A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.

tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_fragment.l: This fragment seems to come both from the past and the future.

cobblesafari.chat.cyrus.s1.b2: My perfect world... Something is troubling it.
cobblesafari.chat.cyrus.s1.b3: This anomaly... This shadow... It need to be taken care of...
cobblesafari.chat.cyrus.s1.a1: I do not know who you are or what you did, but things calmed down.
cobblesafari.chat.cyrus.s1.a2: Now, please leave. And never come back.
cobblesafari.chat.hiker.s1.b1: Welcome to the Sinnoh Underground, Youngling !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.b1: Hello there, trainer ! My name is Hayley. I'm the creator of the Safari. It's so nice to meet you !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.b3: The Safari is a place where rare and endangered pokémon can find a home in artificial habitats created to cater to their need.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.b4: Why don't you try visiting sometimes ? Let me know when you'll have visited it !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.a1: See ? That's such a cool place, right ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.a2: While you're able to visit and even catch some pokémon in the safari, you might have noticed that there's some rules you need to follow :
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.a3: Here, only safari balls are allowed, and finghting is a big no-no ! On top of that, you can only visit for a fixed amount of time every day.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s1.a4: As a thanks for visiting me, I've sent you a few safari balls via your rotom phone.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s2.b1: Every time you visit the safari for the first time each day, you'll get a special delivery, that contains safari balls on top of other things.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s2.b2: Why don't you use thoses to try your luck at catching wild pokémons ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s2.a2: Sure, it can take several tries, but I have something that could help you make it much easier for you !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s3.b1: You should have some Mud Balls on you by now, right ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s3.b2: I know it might sound gross at first, but it's actually quite useful !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s3.b3: First of all, it make you hands looks super smooth. On top of that, when thrown at pokémon, it makes them suuuuper annoyed, making them easier to catch !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s3.b5: Throwing them at pokémon I mean, silly !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s3.a1: Oh, I totally forgot to tell you that angering them makes them prone to fleeing...
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.b1: There's actually a solution to avoid that !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.b2: I've sent you some bait earlier. This one, unlike thoses you cook at a cooking pot, are meant to be thrown at pokémon.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.b3: This has the opposite effect than the mud: they make them calm and friendly, which reduce the chance they will flee.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.b4: But on the other hand, their calmness makes them harder to catch.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a1: Now that you're a master baiter, I'm sure you'll be able to catch pokemon with no issue from now on !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a2: A few things to note: only pokemon in the safari can flee; we allow them to go rest in a special place when visitor bother them too much.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a3: There's a bug in the system tho, which doesn't let shiny pokémon flee. I've heard the guy developing that system never fixed it.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a4: I've heard the guy developing that system never fixed it. I guess that's good for you, right ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a5: Oh and, for the same reason, bait and mud won't work in pokemon from outside the safari.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a6: Like I said earlier, each day when you visit us,, you'll get a refill of balls, mud and bait.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s4.a7: I'll have to go for now.See you tomorrow !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b1: Hello there trainer ! Hope you've had some good sleep !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b2: I sure hope you were planning on coming back today, right ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b3: I haven't told you yet, but the safari is comprised of 18 disctinc environements.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b4: Each of them was especially created to suit the needs of a specific type of pokémon.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b5: For example, the dark type area is full of traps and tricks, the steel area is littered with rusted metal and other metallic junks, and so on !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.b6: Like they used to say on the TV, " gotta find 'em all " ! They say that right ?
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.a2: Each biome has a lot of unique ressources that can only be found here ! So feel free to grab whatever you find.
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.a3: Also, since the teleporter is like, super high tech, it alays teleport you in a new part of the safari each time you use it, meaning you should never end up at the same spot twice !
cobblesafari.chat.hayley.s5.a4: That's all I have left to teach you for now. Have fun in the Safari !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b1: Hello there, trainer ! My name Maxigregrze, the dev of the CobbleSafari mod.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b2: Thank you for helping test the 0.3.0 beta !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b3: This conversation will guide you trough everything you need to know about the new adition in this update.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b4: First of all, please note that the current Hayley questline is a work in progress. It has been shortened so you can have a feel of the current quest system.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b5: Due to that, every rotom phone app have been unlocked for you.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b6: The GUI on the settings app have not been made yet, so you'll have to use the placeholder instead.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b7: Other than that, every single feature from the rotom phone is fully functionnal, so feel free to try them out !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b8: Version 0.3.0 also reworked a lot of existing features :
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b9: The major change is the distortion world : it now has a boss fight !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b10: To sum up how it works, it's basically a survival fight: avoid attacks while your pokemon fight for you !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b11: Bring your strongest pokemon team, as the stronger your team is (level-wise), the shortest the fight will be.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b12: The boss has an unique drop that is only given to only one of the participant, so feel free to take it down all by yourself !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b13: The underground also now have more traders. The biggest change will arrive alongside Cobblemon 1.8, but for now, you can buy traps with a new hiker.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b14: The safari had its dark, ghost, psychic, fighting, steel, ground, poison, water, dragon, fire, ghost and flying biomes all had exclusive new blocks added. They all have either a fun gimmick, or are simply cool decoration.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b15: Finally, dimension objectives have been added to every dungeons ! Similar to Z-A's DLC quests, they reward you for completing tasks inside the dungeon. THey, for now, only reward you with items, but will be the main objective of hyperspace luminose.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b16: If you have any questions, feedback, complains, or deep philosophical question, feel free to hit me up on discord !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.b17: Since this is a quest, click the button below to reedeem something from me !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.a1: As a thank you for reading everything, I've sent you a custom trade offer via the GTS that only you can see.
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.a2: It's a rotom, and it has a lot of cool ribbons you can't find anywhere else !
cobblesafari.test.dev.s1.a3: Thanks again for helping test the 0.3.0 beta !
